ok.description: Envelope marker (matches the CLI JSON convention).

version.description: Claudexor version serving this catalog (compare with CLAUDEXOR_PLUGIN_VERSION to detect plugin skew).

generatedAt.description: ISO timestamp when the catalog was composed.

id.description: Harness id (codex, claude, cursor, opencode, raw-api, openrouter, ...).

displayName.description: Human display name from the manifest.

status.description: Doctor verdict: ok | degraded | unavailable (doctor-backed, cached ~90s).

providerFamily.description: Vendor family the harness routes to.

enabledIntents.description: Intents the gateway will route to this harness right now.

disabledIntents.description: Intents the doctor disabled (with reasons in `reasons`).

reasons.description: Human-readable doctor/discovery reasons for degraded or unavailable status.

configuredModel.description: The user's configured per-harness default model, if any (null = engine default routing).

configuredModelValid.description: Strict truth-source check of configuredModel (null when no model is configured).

source.description: Where the model list comes from: a live vendor API enumeration, the adapter manifest's curated hints, or nothing (model overrides are refused for source=none).

count.description: Number of enumerable models (GET /harnesses/:id/models has the full list).

verifiedAgainst.description: Vendor CLI version the manifest hints were last verified against (null for api/none sources).

models.description: Summary of a harness's model truth source (full list via the models endpoint/verb).

webPolicy.description: How external web/search is controlled for this harness.

imageInput.description: Attachment/vision delivery mechanism the adapter supports.

effortLevels.description: Reasoning-effort ladder the adapter declares (normalized by the engine).

accessProfilesSupported.description: Access profiles the adapter can enforce.

readonlyMechanism.description: HOW read-only is enforced (fs_sandbox | permission_deny | tool_allowlist | none) — none means read-only intent is advisory for this harness.

items.description: Per-harness live capability row (manifest + doctor + model truth).

availableHarnesses.description: Convenience: ids with doctor status ok.

modes.description: Canonical run modes (strategies like --n/--until-clean/--swarm are flags, not modes).

runControlKeys.description: Accepted POST /runs request keys (derived from the ControlRunStartRequest schema; the CLI/MCP/ACP surfaces project subsets of these).

readOnlyModes.description: Canonical modes that never mutate the project tree (ask/plan/audit; orchestrate in suggest autonomy is also read-only).

writeModes.description: Canonical modes that may mutate a tree (agent always; orchestrate only above suggest autonomy).

isolationKinds.description: Run isolation: envelope = isolated worktree under .claudexor/workspaces (default), live = the project tree itself.

accessProfiles.description: Access vocabulary; `full` additionally requires the per-repo trust allow (claudexor trust --allow-full-access).

applyModes.description: Delivery modes for applying a run's WorkProduct to the project.

mutability.description: The mutability matrix: every way a Claudexor run can (or cannot) touch a tree, from the schema's closed vocabularies.
read = never mutates the tree; write = produces tree changes (envelope or live); delivery = moves an existing WorkProduct into the tree/VCS; ops = local config/daemon plumbing.

items.description: CLI verb projection from the command registry (same data `claudexor help --json` serves).

cliCommands.description: CLI verbs with mutability/stability (full flag detail via `claudexor help --json`).

mcpTools.description: MCP tool names `claudexor mcp serve` exposes.

applyEligibilityVocabulary.description: RunApplyState vocabulary an agent can encounter on run results (not_applied | applied | applied_review_blocked | reverted).

AgentCapabilityCatalog.description: Machine-readable capability catalog for external agents — derived, never hand-maintained.
